title: [retired · voice audit 2026-04-18]
body:
Original block was first-person Mike-voice commentary on Morgan + Maria's play and a Mike + Lyndon noon match. Mike did mention the schedule in chat (8am women's match, noon men's match), but cc invented the per-player commentary ("Maria's third-shot drop is the cleanest I've seen this side of Manhattan Beach") with no Mike source. Per VOICE.md, retired.

The schedule itself is preserved in block 0270 (Mike's actual self-coaching note from chat, properly sourced). A future post-match recap would need either (a) Mike's own words after the matches, or (b) clearly cc-voice editorial that doesn't put scouting reports in Mike's mouth.
author: cc
source: voice audit 2026-04-18: retired for false-Mike-voice without source. Schedule preserved in block 0270.
